title: Remove container from state before cleaning up.
body:
Attempt to cleanup as much of the container as possible, even if one
of the cleanup stages fails.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: I'd like to just logrus.Errorf the errors instead of repeatedly wrapping, but otherwise LGTM

Ok this finally passes tests.
@wking @mheon @baude @TomSweeneyRedHat @umohnani8 PTAL
